title: Qlog QUIC Transport Activity Work Item
summary: Implement the qlog QUIC packet, UDP datagram, stream, and datagram movement event contracts.
planned_changes: Add typed event payload contracts for packet_sent, packet_received, packet_dropped, packet_buffered, packets_acked, udp_datagrams_sent, udp_datagrams_received, udp_datagram_dropped, stream_state_updated, stream_data_moved, and datagram_data_moved. Keep this slice independent of lifecycle, negotiation, migration, and recovery state.
out_of_scope: Migration, key lifecycle, recovery, and congestion events.
verification_plan: Run snapshot and contract tests over representative packet and data-movement events and confirm the core writer can serialize the payloads without special casing.
